title: Birthdays
excerpt: A wonderful celebration awaits campers whose birthday occurs during their session at camp, including yummy cake for their cabin and lots of singing by everyone in camp! (If your child’s birthday falls during their time at camp, please highlight this on the Confidential Camper Questionnaire.) Unfortunately, telephone calls are not permitted on this special day. […]
contentHtml: A wonderful celebration awaits campers whose birthday occurs during their session at camp, including yummy cake for their cabin and lots of singing by everyone in camp! (If your child’s birthday falls during their time at camp, please highlight this on the Confidential Camper Questionnaire.) Unfortunately, telephone calls are not permitted on this special day. Instead, please consider letters, cards, or emails! For more information on how to communicate with your camper, please visit our Communicating at Camp page.
contentText:
A wonderful celebration awaits campers whose birthday occurs during their session at camp, including yummy cake for their cabin and lots of singing by everyone in camp! (If your child’s birthday falls during their time at camp, please highlight this on the Confidential Camper Questionnaire.) 
Unfortunately, telephone calls are not
 
permitted on this special day.
 Instead, please consider letters, cards, or emails! For more information on how to communicate with your camper, please visit our 
Communicating at Camp
 page.
